title: T-030 — API: D365 connection test + feature flag gate
prompt: Per §13.6 + V-TEC-70. Implement GET /api/technical/d365/health (admin only) calling D365 ping endpoint with stored credentials; returns { connected: bool, latency_ms, last_sync_at, version }. Also implement gate utility `assertD365Enabled()` used by all D365 endpoints — checks feature flag `integration.d365.enabled` AND that 5 Apex D365 constants from 02-SETTINGS §11 are populated (V-SET-42). RED tests/api/d365-health.test.ts. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/api/d365-health.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Connection test endpoint + feature-flag gate utility for all D365 endpoints.
pipeline_inputs.details: Permission gate: technical.d365.sync.trigger or 'owner' role. Returns sanitized info — no secrets in payload. assertD365Enabled used as guard.
acceptance_criteria: Given integration.d365.enabled=false, when assertD365Enabled invoked, then throws Disabled error.
Given any of 5 Apex constants empty, when assertD365Enabled invoked, then throws V-SET-42 error.
Given valid config, when GET /health called, then JSON includes connected, latency_ms, last_sync_at.
test_strategy: RED tests for gate + sanitized health response.
risk_red_lines: Do not return secrets in health response.
